optimize_response.reasoning: Deck completado com cartas sinérgicas ao arquétipo aggro, priorizando sinergia com o Commander e a proporção ideal de terrenos/spells.

deck_analysis.mana_base_assessment: Poucos terrenos para Commander (Tem 0, ideal >= 34). Falta mana B (Tem 0 fontes, ideal > 15). Falta mana R (Tem 0 fontes, ideal > 15). Falta mana G (Tem 0 fontes, ideal > 15)
deck_analysis.mana_curve_assessment: ALERTA: Curva fora do ideal para Midrange (2.5-3.5)

saved_cards.oracle_text:
Enchant creature card in a graveyard

Return enchanted creature card to the battlefield under your control and attach this Aura to it. When this Aura leaves the battlefield, that creature's controller sacrifices it.
Enchanted creature gets -1/-0.
